title: Germanj
compiled_truth: Germanj is an external contact at [Basf-corp](companies/basf-corp). Over the corpus period (1999-12-27 to 2002-06-24), Germanj sent 7 and received 140 emails, totalling 147 interactions. Top correspondents: [Chris Germany](people/chris-germany) (6), [Cgerman](people/cgerman) (1).
timeline:
